tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
                            SWEET DREAMS - Beyoncé
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: Volpone

I think this is the most accurate version, certainly the one I play. No capo 
required :) Lovely song

Standard

Chords

[tab]    [ch]Ebm[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]   [ch]Cb[/ch]   [ch]Gb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
e|--6----4----1----2----2----4--|
b|--7----6----2----4----2----4--|
G|--8----6----3----4----3----5--|
D|--8----6----3----4----4----6--|
A|--6----4----1----2----4----6--|
E|----------------------2----4--|[/tab]




[tab][ch]Ebm[/ch]                   [ch]Db[/ch]
Every night I rush to my bed[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbm[/ch]                         [ch]Cb[/ch]
with hopes that maybe I’ll get a chance to see you[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Ebm[/ch]
When I close my eyes[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Db[/ch]
I’m goin outta my head[/tab]

Can you hold my hands and be my guide[/tab]

You can be a sweet dream or a beautiful nightmare[/tab]
